papers_found.title: On Zaremba's conjecture
papers_found.notes: Proves density 1 for A=50. Our A=3 claim is a dramatic computational strengthening.

oeis_matches: 27-exception sequence (6,20,28,...,6234) NOT IN OEIS — novel sequence
assessment: Bourgain-Kontorovich (2014) proves density 1 for A=50 non-effectively. Our claim that A=3 suffices with exactly 27 exceptions is a much stronger computational result. No contradiction with literature. The 27-exception sequence should be submitted to OEIS.
